name: Underfloor Heating Calculator
seo_description: Underfloor Heating Calculator. Heated area, Pipe spacing, Max length per circuit — get Pipe length (+10%), Circuits, Manifolds instantly for your plumbing.
example_label: Calculatete pipe length for underfloor heating: 80m2 with 15cm spacing.

range_hints.area_m2: area a calefaccionar with floor radiant
range_hints.circuitos_max_m: length máxima per circuito: 80-120m according to diameter

result_context: To {area_m2}m² with pipe each {separacion_cm}cm need {tuberia_m}m of tubo PEX in {circuitos_ud} circuitos. Colector of {vias_ud} vías requerido.
formula_display: Tubería = area × (100 ÷ separación_cm); Circuitos = pipe ÷ circuitos_max_m
steps: Apply factor 1.10 per bordes: 533m × 1.10 = 586m of tubo
mistakes: Exceder length máxima per circuito (loss of carga excesiva)
Not aislar térmicamente low The tubos (loss hacia abajo)
Not dejar juntas of dilatación in surfaces > 40m²
description: Underfloor heating pipe length based on area and pipe spacing.
desc: Calculate pipe length and circuits for underfloor heating.
